about.title: About Fun Books Publisher
about.subtitle: A small team with a big mission: creating books that make a real difference in people's daily lives.
about.missionText: We believe that the best books are the ones you come back to — the ones that help you slow down, think clearly, or simply enjoy a quiet moment. That's what we create.
about.storyText: Fun Books Publisher started with a simple idea: create coloring books that adults actually want to use. Not childish, not overwhelming — just beautifully designed pages that invite you to pick up a pen and breathe. Today, we publish across five categories — from monochrome art therapy to brain-boosting puzzles, from kids' educational guides to books in Spanish. Every book is crafted with care, tested by real users, and available worldwide on Amazon.
about.qualityText: Every design is hand-crafted. Every page is tested. We'd rather publish one great book than ten mediocre ones.
about.accessibilityText: Books in English and Spanish, available worldwide through Amazon, at prices that feel fair.
about.purposeText: Whether it's stress relief, brain training, or pure fun — every title we publish serves a clear purpose.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our books, shipping, and more.

questions.q1: Where can I buy your books?
questions.a1: All our books are available exclusively on Amazon. We ship worldwide through Amazon's fulfillment network.
questions.q2: Are your books available as eBooks or PDFs?
questions.a2: Our coloring and activity books are paperback only — they're designed to be used with real pens and pencils.
questions.q3: What paper quality do your coloring books use?
questions.a3: We use premium quality paper that prevents bleed-through with most markers and colored pencils. Each page is printed on one side only for the best coloring experience.
questions.q4: Do you offer free digital bonuses?
questions.a4: Yes! Many of our books include free downloadable bonus pages. Look for the bonus section on each book's detail page.
questions.q5: Can I return a book if I'm not satisfied?
questions.a5: Absolutely. All purchases are covered by Amazon's standard return policy. If you're not happy, you can return the book within 30 days.
questions.q6: Do you publish in languages other than English?
questions.a6: Yes! We have a growing collection of books in Spanish, including puzzle books and cognitive exercise books for seniors.
questions.q7: How can I contact you for business inquiries?
questions.a7: Please use our Contact page or email us directly. We're open to collaborations, bulk orders, and media requests.

bonus.emailLabel: Get it sent to your email (recommended)
bonus.emailNote: We'll send you the PDF and occasionally share new releases. Unsubscribe anytime.
bonus.readySubtitle: Click the button below to download your free pages.
bonus.tip1: Print on cardstock (160gsm+) to prevent bleed-through.
bonus.tip2: Print at 100% scale for original resolution.
bonus.tip3: Tag us #FunBooksPublisher on social media to be featured!
bonus.notFoundText: Sorry, bonus pages are not yet available for this book. Check back soon!
